title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libdmx bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libdmx is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The X.Org X11 DMX (Distributed Multihead X) runtime library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add libdmx-devel package to RHEL8 any public available repo (JIRA:RHEL-117869)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RFE] Please add libdmx-devel package to RHEL8 any public available repo

full_text:
An update for libdmx is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The X.Org X11 DMX (Distributed Multihead X) runtime library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add libdmx-devel package to RHEL8 any public available repo (JIRA:RHEL-117869)
